strengths: Strong distributed-systems and event-driven architecture experience (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby media)
Proven track record scaling engineering teams and processes (e.g., RIDE Capital, re:cinq)
Hands-on technical leadership with TDD, CI/CD, and production reliability focus (e.g., Altom Consulting, Optilyz)
concerns: Limited direct fintech or agentic-AI production experience (no explicit mention of credit systems, real-time risk, or multi-agent frameworks)
No clear evidence of operating AI systems in highly regulated or high-stakes commercial environments
Scant evidence of hybrid engineering governance (outsourced teams, quality gates, security baselines)
response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates strong technical leadership and distributed-systems expertise, particularly in event-driven architectures and scalable engineering practices. However, her resume lacks direct evidence of agentic-AI system design in fintech contexts or hands-on experience with regulatory-compliant AI infrastructure. Her background aligns well with engineering leadership and backend systems but falls short on domain-specific fintech and agentic-AI requirements.
